meaning: n.(圣书、古代典籍的)抄本,法律,规则,药典
examples: Ful medames, another Near Eastern food at step five in the codex process, is made from fava beans and can be served at breakfast, lunch or dinner.
The 9th-century Codex Sangallensis is an abecedarium.
A codex is a Mayan written record.
Codex pioneered the field of book audience research and has interviewed almost 300, 000 book buyers since 2004.
Codex, was fired by her therapist for not setting limits on the time she spent in her MMO.
